notes: Seeded from the existing owned competitor profile. Expand only with real product claims. claimed items are eligible for sync into competitors/tachyon.json.
positioning: Owned reference ADE for audited multi-agent development, reproducible task worktrees, evidence capture, and verification-first handoff.

agent_support.name: configured local agent runtimes
agent_support.summary: Product runs against operator-configured local agent runtimes.

agent_support.name: sub-agent workflows
agent_support.summary: Work can be delegated to sub-agents within the owned product flow.

orchestration.name: multi-agent delegation
orchestration.summary: Tasks can be split across more than one agent role or step.

orchestration.name: review handoff
orchestration.summary: Work returns through an explicit handoff/review path.

orchestration.name: task-specific verification
orchestration.summary: Completion can require a task- or project-specific verification gate.

workspace_isolation.name: git worktree isolation
workspace_isolation.summary: Delegated work can run in isolated git worktrees.

workspace_isolation.name: explicit owned path boundaries for delegated work
workspace_isolation.summary: Agents are expected to stay within owned paths for a task.

review_shipping.name: evidence records
review_shipping.summary: Durable evidence is part of accepting agent work.

review_shipping.name: verification logs
review_shipping.summary: Verification output is retained as part of the delivery trail.

review_shipping.name: human-readable handoff and review flow
review_shipping.summary: Handoff is reviewable by a human operator.

remote_mobile.name: not claimed in public competitor profile
remote_mobile.summary: No remote/mobile product claim is exported to the public roster yet.

context_memory.name: handoff context
context_memory.summary: Context needed for handoff persists across steps.

context_memory.name: task evidence
context_memory.summary: Task-level evidence remains available after agent turns.

context_memory.name: spec-driven development records when used
context_memory.summary: When SDD records are used, they can inform agent work.

integrations.name: plugins
integrations.summary: Extensibility via a plugin surface (owned product).

integrations.name: host action governance
integrations.summary: Host actions are treated as governed capabilities, not free-for-all.

integrations.name: repository-local verification commands
integrations.summary: Project or bench verifiers can gate acceptance.

placeholders.name: remote operator surface
placeholders.summary: TBD if/when product documents remote control.

placeholders.name: named third-party CLI matrix
placeholders.summary: Public list of supported vendor CLIs when product docs allow.
